news.title: Cell therapy biotech Obsidian leverages Galera reverse merger to go public
news.snippet: After initiating a wind-down more than 18 months ago and exploring liquidation, Galera Therapeutics has found a partner via a reverse merger with Obsidian Therapeutics that will take oncology-focused

news.title: Astellas to close stem cell unit’s Seattle site, with layoffs incoming
news.snippet: Astellas is preparing to close its Seattle site for its stem cell therapy unit, with around 55 employees set to be affected.

news.title: Click Therapeutics cuts staff after commercial deal restructuring
news.snippet: Click Therapeutics is cutting staff just days after announcing a new funding round and taking over commercial work for its experimental digital therapeutic, CT-155.

news.title: Novo taps OpenAI to deploy AI across R&D, manufacturing and corporate functions
news.snippet: The AI will be used to analyze complex datasets and shrink R&D timelines, Novo said. It'll additionally use the tech to seek efficiencies across manufacturing and corporate functions.

news.title: Australia’s Kazia pays research institute $1.4M for epigenetic platform, preclinical drug
news.snippet: Kazia Therapeutics is paying $1.4 million upfront to secure a platform for generating epigenetic drugs from an Australian research institute.

news.title: Fierce Biotech Layoff Tracker 2026: Astellas shutters cell therapy site; Replimune reduces staff
news.snippet: As always, if you know of layoffs occurring at a biotech, please reach out to the Fierce Biotech editorial team.

news.title: Takeda terminates mRNA research pact with Japanese drug discovery specialist
news.snippet: Takeda has pulled back from a research collaboration with a fellow Japanese life sciences company, ending work to discover new small molecules that target mRNA.

news.title: Stryker makes a buy as Avanos Medical to go private in a spate of medtech M&A deals
news.snippet: Stryker picked up vascular devices maker Amplitude Vascular Systems and Avanos Medical is being taken private in a spate of medtech M&A deals.

news.title: Lilly makes preclinical ADC specialist CrossBridge its latest acquisition in vague $300M deal
news.snippet: Eli Lilly has turned its attention down south with a $300 million biobuck acquisition of Houston-based CrossBridge Bio, aiming to advance its dual-payload antibody-drug conjugate (ADCs) pipeline.

news.title: Alamar Biosciences files for IPO amid opening life sciences funding window
news.snippet: Californian protein sequencing company Alamar Biosciences is seeking an IPO worth up to $159 million amid a growing boom in life sciences public offerings.

news.title: Harbinger Health raises $100M for new suite of blood-based cancer detection tests
news.snippet: Harbinger Health has grabbed $100 million in its latest funding round as the company reveals a new Resolve in its cancer detection work.

news.title: Boehringer, Amgen discard early immunology candidates over lack of clinical potential
news.snippet: Boehringer Ingelheim and Amgen have both canned early-stage immunology candidates after the prospects showed little clinical promise.

news.title: FDA urges clinical trial sponsors to report the results of their studies
news.snippet: An FDA review of records found that results have not been reported for 30% of registered clinical studies. To remedy this shortfall, the U.S. regulator has sent reminders to 2,200 drug companies, medi

news.title: Kailera outlines plans for $528.5M IPO to support quartet of Chinese obesity assets
news.snippet: Kailera is taking another step into the competitive obesity market by aiming to raise up to $528.5 million via a Nasdaq IPO, with proceeds intended to advance its GLP-1 assets through clinical develop

news.title: Spyre points to phase 2 win for ulcerative colitis drug as proof it could take on Takeda’s Entyvio
news.snippet: Spyre Therapeutics’ monoclonal antibody hit the key goal in a phase 2 study for ulcerative colitis, which the company has touted as proof it can best Takeda’s Entyvio.

news.title: Travere maps course for Filspari's $3B US opportunity after landmark rare disease nod
news.snippet: Travere is eyeing a collective $3 billion U.S. opportunity for Filspari thanks to a new rare kidney disease nod, plus the med's initial 2023 approval in another rare kidney indication.

news.title: FDA tells Eli Lilly to round up more safety info on key obesity launch Foundayo
news.snippet: Even as Eli Lilly gets underway with its next major obesity launch in Foundayo, the FDA's approval letter for the oral treatment shows lingering reservations about multiple "unexpected serious" risks

news.title: J&J, chasing $100B year, sports immunology ‘dual powerhouse’ of Tremfya and new launch Icotyde
news.snippet: Protagonist Therapeutics-partnered Icotyde has the potential to become one of Johnson & Johnson's "largest products ever," CEO Joaquin Duato said on the company's first-quarter earnings conference

news.title: Novo taps OpenAI to deploy AI across R&D, manufacturing and corporate functions
news.snippet: The AI will be used to analyze complex datasets and shrink R&D timelines, Novo said. It'll additionally use the tech to seek efficiencies across manufacturing and corporate functions.

news.title: Pfizer rebuked by FDA for misleading Adcetris ads on Facebook
news.snippet: The FDA has scolded Pfizer over Facebook ads for the cancer drug Adcetris, accusing the Big Pharma of failing to adequately communicate the indication, contraindications and risks.

news.title: Despite uncertainties, Travere’s Filspari emerges as first FDA-approved FSGS treatment
news.snippet: From a negative phase 3 readout and a seemingly tightening regulatory climate to a grueling three-month review extension, Travere has defied the odds, securing Filspari a landmark FDA approval as the

news.title: Regulatory tracker: FDA signs off on generics for AstraZeneca's Farxiga
news.snippet: In this tracker, Fierce Pharma is recording the regulatory progress of in-market products, including expansions into key geographies and new indications. Some of these updates may not meet the bar for

news.title: Lilly’s Jaypirca shows fixed-duration power in ‘ambitious’ phase 3 CLL trial win
news.snippet: Eli Lilly has chalked up another victory in the chronic lymphocytic leukemia space, as its BTK inhibitor Jaypirca delivered its fourth positive phase 3 readout in the blood cancer, this time as an ind

news.title: ViiV launches ‘Still Here’ campaign aimed at reminding young people about HIV
news.snippet: GSK and Shionogi’s ViiV Healthcare is seeking to raise awareness around what the company sees as a forgotten element in HIV: young people with the infection.

news.title: Omnichannel Has an Access Problem. Compliant AI Fixes It.
news.snippet: Omnichannel isn’t a content problem. It’s an access problem. See how compliant AI connects HCPs and patients to the right answers instantly.

news.title: Regeneron rides into radiopharma via $2.1B biobucks pact with Australia’s Telix
news.snippet: With its latest obesity play appearing to pay off, Regeneron has turned its attention to radiopharmaceuticals.

news.title: HHS, after legal setback, updates ACIP charter to put more emphasis on vaccine safety
news.snippet: HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is continuing to reshape the CDC’s Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices in a way that’s setting off alarm bells for some experts.

news.title: UPDATED: Replimune to reduce workforce following 'disappointing' second rejection for melanoma prospect
news.snippet: The second time is not the charm for Replimune’s melanoma candidate RP1. After spurning the immunotherapy last July, the FDA has now rejected the biotech’s resubmitted application.

news.title: Starting material sourcing bottlenecks increase US drug shortage risks: report
news.snippet: As geopolitics bring reshoring interest to a fever pitch, the United States Pharmacopeia (USP) is adding to the impetus for local drug production with a warning that homes in on the pharmaceutical bui

news.title: Novartis cuts 114 more jobs at New Jersey HQ as restructuring rolls on
news.snippet: Novartis is making further workforce reductions at its U.S. headquarters in New Jersey, planning to remove 114 positions as the drugmaker rejigs its sales team for rare disease medicines.

news.title: STAT+: FDA pressures drugmakers to report trial results
news.snippet: Ben Sasse on enrolling in Rev Med's drug trial, more ADC investment, and other biotech news from The Readout

news.title: STAT+: Pharmalittle: We’re reading about an FDA push for trial transparency, a Novo-OpenAI deal, and more
news.snippet: The FDA told more than 2,200 companies and researchers that they are required to report clinical trial results, or they may face fines

news.title: For Ben Sasse, Revolution Medicines’ pancreatic cancer trial felt like his best, only option
news.snippet: Former Sen. Ben Sasse gives a glimpse of what it's like to be a participant in an tough but promising new drug for pancreatic cancer.

news.title: STAT+: Dana-Farber CEO talks untangling from Mass General Brigham and building new cancer hospital
news.snippet: Dana-Farber CEO Benjamin Ebert has no shortage of ideas and vision for the cancer institute as it untangles from Mass General Brigham and builds a new hospital.

news.title: Opinion: My brother can’t access a just-approved breakthrough drug for his rare disease
news.snippet: Rare disease clinical trials, policy discussions, and advocacy initiatives often leave adults behind.

news.title: STAT+: Maryland state affordability board sets its first price cap for a medicine
news.snippet: The board will now oversee a process to lower the cost of the type 2 diabetes medicine Jardiance by January 2027.

news.title: STAT+: FDA pushes drugmakers to report missing clinical trial results
news.snippet: FDA officials said an internal analysis found results were not submitted for nearly 30% of studies “highly likely” to fall under mandatory reporting requirements.

news.title: STAT+: Federal judge tosses California No Surprises Act lawsuit against HaloMD
news.snippet: HaloMD is a middleman that became the top filer of out-of-network billing disputes on behalf of medical providers.

news.title: STAT+: GSK advancing ovarian cancer drug mo-rez
news.snippet: Revolution Medicines 'unprecedented' cancer trial data, Allogene's off-the-shelf CAR-T, and other biotech news

news.title: New light shed on who benefits most from weight-loss jabs
news.snippet: People who carry variations in two genes linked to appetite and digestion can lose more weight when taking drugs to treat obesity, research suggests.
